emails.body: RE: Deals to be moved to Bankruptcy Books (From Russell's Exposure Report) I just want to be crystal clear on the file you sent. We need to move all of these deals to the Bankruptcy book? Thanks for your help. PL

emails.body: RE: Deals to be moved to Bankruptcy Books (From Russell's Exposure Report) Is this the last list we are going to get? Jeff Gossett wants to know if we are done so that we can assure Don Miller that all of the CP's have been taken care of. Thanks. PL

emails.body: RE: Deals to be moved to Bankruptcy Books (From Russell's Exposure Report) Stacey Richardson is researching additional transactions we are receiving daily updates from legal regarding counterparties who have terminated either their agreements or specific transactions due to the bankruptcy. However, the deal count should begin to reduce. Not the answer you were looking for, but the best I can give for today. Cyndie
